gaps.description: ARCHITECTURE.md exists and accurately documents the system design
StorageBackend interface fully implemented with all 8 methods (get, set, delete, list, scan, scanStream, batchGet, batchSet) plus optional stat
All 6 backends implemented: AgenticStore, OPFS, NodeFs, Memory, LocalStorage, SQLite
OPFSBackend has empty-path validation via validatePath() on get/set/delete/stat
Cross-backend consistency tests exist covering all Node-testable backends (15+ behavioral tests)
Error types (NotFoundError, PermissionDeniedError, IOError) defined and used consistently
AgenticFileSystem implements getToolDefinitions() and executeTool() with full tool coverage
shellFsTools exports all 6 MCP-compatible tools (shell_cat, shell_head, shell_tail, shell_find, shell_delete, shell_tree)
createBackend auto-selection logic with createDefaultBackend/createAutoBackend aliases
Architecture doc auto-selection order omits SQLite priority steps present in code (additive, not a gap)
